title: Trump calls Iran’s response to peace plan ‘unacceptable’ as ceasefire is tested
description: Iran defended the proposal as “reasonable and generous,” as oil prices rose Monday morning in response to the continued stalemate.

title: DeSantis’s new House map sparks bipartisan anger in Puerto Rican hub in Florida
description: The governor said his state needed to redistrict to account for population growth. But in a majority-Hispanic area, that growth could work against him.

title: Confident in China’s power, Xi is ready to host an unpredictable Trump
description: Holding no illusions about making lasting deals at this week’s summit, China’s leader looks to project Beijing as an alternative to U.S. volatility on the world stage.

title: Congress likely to pass Republicans' plan to fund ICE
description: Congress is back after a week-long break and is poised to move ahead with Republicans' plan to fund immigration enforcement for the next three years.

title: What's next for Virginia Dems after state's Supreme Court strikes down redrawn map
description: NPR's A Martinez asks New York Times correspondent Reid Epstein what Democrats in Virginia are planning now, after their redrawn election map was struck down by the state's Supreme Court.

title: Abraham Foxman, influential leader of Anti-Defamation League, dies at 86
description: As the ADL’s national director for nearly 30 years, he battled antisemitism and other forms of prejudice, building the group into a powerful watchdog.

title: Trump rejects Iran's latest response to U.S. ceasefire proposal
description: Iran delivered its response to Pakistani mediators on Sunday, according to the state-run Islamic Republic News Agency.

title: Lawyers for the global elite aren’t buying Trump’s gold card visa
description: Even Melania’s former lawyer is warning people away from Trump’s program designed to make immigration easier for the wealthy.

title: Republicans who denied 2020 election results could be governors next year
description: Winners will have oversight of 2028 elections in swing states like Arizona, Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.

title: On Trump's Beijing agenda: Strait of Hormuz, Taiwan and AI
description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe looks ahead to President Trump's visit this week to China with Patricia Kim of The Brookings Institution.

title: Politics chat: White House awaits Iran's response to deal, Trump to meet Xi
description: The White House waits for Iran's response to the latest deal to end the war, as President Trump prepares for a meeting in Beijing with Chinese President Xi Jingping later this week.

title: Iran ceasefire tested as cargo ship catches fire after being hit off Qatar's coast
description: A cargo ship caught fire Sunday after being hit by an unknown projectile off Qatar's coast, the British military said.

title: Gas, groceries and getting by: How voters in one Ohio district see affordability
description: Ohio voters headed to the polls last week for primary elections, and in competitive districts like the one where Toledo is primarily located, the message was clear: affordability is a top priority.

title: Protests and boycotts rock prestigious Venice Biennale
description: The 61st edition of the international art event launched on Saturday in an atmosphere marked by geopolitical strife.

title: Tracking the hot-button issues driving this year's midterms politics
description: Record high oil prices, war with Iran, and controversial immigration policies are just some of the issues for voters. NPR's Domenico Montanaro talks about covering this year's complex midterms.

title: Week in Politics: Redistricting fight in Tennessee and Virginia; latest poll on Trump
description: We look at the redistricting battles in Tennessee and Virginia, as well as what the latest poll numbers say about President Trump's handling of the economy and the war on Iran.
